reasoning: The timeline until the July 1, 2025 resolution date is very short (less than two months from the May 6 knowledge cutoff). While the White House is reportedly debating lifting sanctions on Nord Stream 2 as part of a broader Ukraine peace effort, negotiations for such a complex geopolitical agreement typically take months. Even if a deal is struck, sanctions relief might be phased, and Congressional opposition or procedural delays (e.g., notification periods) could further push the delisting date beyond July 1. Thus, the probability of the OFAC delisting happening before July 1 is low.
batch_queries: Will the US lift its sanctions on Nord Stream 2 before July 1, 2025?
